title: Iran targets U.S. bases for a second night, raising fears of renewed combat
summary_full: Iran said it launched the attacks in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan in response to U.S. strikes that it claimed effectively rendered the April ceasefire “meaningless.”
summary_public: Iran said it launched the attacks in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan in response to U.S. strikes that it claimed effectively rendered the April ceasefire “meaningless.”

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran targets U.S. bases for a second night, raising fears of renewed combat
